---
title: "Fan Yin"
image: files/photo.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15rem
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script type="application/ld+json">
        {
          "@context": "https://schema.org",
          "@type": "Person",
          "name": "Fan Yin",
          "jobTitle": "PhD Student",
          "affiliation": [
            {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "Berlin School of Economics",
              "url": "https://berlinschoolofeconomics.de"
            },
            {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "Humboldt University Berlin",
              "url": "https://www.hu-berlin.de/en"
            }
          ],
          "email": "fan.yin@hu-berlin.de",
          "url": "https://agrawe.eu",
          "knowsAbout": ["Spatial Economics", "Urban Economics", "Economic History"],
          "alumniOf": [
            {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "University of Heidelberg"
            }
          ]
        }
        </script>
---

I am a PhD student at the [Berlin School of Economics](https://berlinschoolofeconomics.de "Berlin School of Economics") and [Humboldt University](https://www.hu-berlin.de/en){target="_blank"}. I finished my Master's (Economics) and Bachelor's (Sociology) studies in University of Heidelberg.
My interests are in spatial economics, urban economics, and economic history. 

If you'd like to chat or grab a coffee, feel free to reach out anytime!

---

**Contact**<br>
Fan Yin<br>
Humboldt University<br>
Chair of Econometrics<br>
Spandauer Straße 1<br>
10178 Berlin

E-Mail: [fan.yin@hu-berlin.de](mailto:fan.yin@hu-berlin.de)
